# This file was generated by the YaTool build system (https://github.com/yandex/yatool),
# from a source YaTool build configuration provided in ya.make files.
#
# If the repository supports both CMake and ya build configurations, please modify both of them.
#
# If only CMake build configuration is supported then modify only CMake files and note that only
# simple modifications are allowed like adding source-files to targets or adding simple properties
# like target_include_directories. These modifications will be ported to original ya.make files
# by maintainers. Any complex modifications which can't be easily ported back to the ya build
# system may be rejected.
#
# Please refer to the build instructions in the repository for more information about manual
# changes in this file.

find_package(linux-headers-generic REQUIRED)

add_subdirectory(proto)
add_subdirectory(unittest)

add_library(library-cpp-companion)


target_compile_options(library-cpp-companion PRIVATE
  -Wdeprecated-this-capture
  -Wimplicit-fallthrough
  -Wparentheses
  -Wno-logical-op-parentheses
  -Wno-bitwise-op-parentheses
  -Wswitch
  -Wreturn-type
)

target_link_libraries(library-cpp-companion PUBLIC
  linux-headers-generic::linux-headers-generic
  contrib-libs-cxxsupp
  yutil
  cpp-companion-proto
  yt-library-process
  core-rpc-grpc
  library-cpp-common
  library-cpp-computation
  library-cpp-misc
)

target_sources(library-cpp-companion PRIVATE
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/companion/companion_client_detail.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/companion/companion_entrypoint.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/companion/companion_manager.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/companion/companion_model.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/companion/java_companion_manager.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/companion/java_process_manager.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/companion/companion_process_manager.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/companion/companion_proxy.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/companion/companion_singleton_state.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/companion/config.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/companion/jvm_options.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/companion/process_manager_base.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/companion/swift_map_companion_computation.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/companion/swift_ordered_source_companion_computation.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/companion/transform_companion_computation.cpp
)


add_global_library_for(library-cpp-companion.global
  library-cpp-companion)


target_compile_options(library-cpp-companion.global PRIVATE
  -Wdeprecated-this-capture
  -Wimplicit-fallthrough
  -Wparentheses
  -Wno-logical-op-parentheses
  -Wno-bitwise-op-parentheses
  -Wswitch
  -Wreturn-type
)

target_link_libraries(library-cpp-companion.global PUBLIC
  linux-headers-generic::linux-headers-generic
  contrib-libs-cxxsupp
  yutil
  cpp-companion-proto
  yt-library-process
  core-rpc-grpc
  library-cpp-common
  library-cpp-computation
  library-cpp-misc
)

target_sources(library-cpp-companion.global PRIVATE
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/companion/register.cpp
)
